title: API limit exceeded in Google Drive Copy File module
symptom: When processing multiple rows in a Google Sheet, the workflow encounters a 400 error due to exceeding API limits.
applies_when: Using Google Drive Copy File module
Processing multiple rows from Google Sheet
root_cause: The Google Drive API has rate limits that restrict the number of requests that can be made in a short period. When multiple files are created in quick succession, these limits can be exceeded, resulting in 400 errors.
fix_steps: Insert a Loop node after the node that reads rows from Google Sheet.
Set the Loop batch size to 1 to process each row individually.
Within the Loop, add a Wait node to introduce a delay between requests.
Ensure all operations for each row are included within the Loop.
agent_instruction: Use a Loop node with a batch size of 1 and add a Wait node to manage API request limits.
